description_long: This object is a vintage Shell gas pump, featuring a prominent round Shell Oil sign at the top with a red and yellow color scheme. The front panel is yellow with a red Shell logo and a metallic display plate, likely for fuel measurement or instructions. A black fuel hose with a nozzle is attached to the side, and the pump body is primarily red with some visible wear and weathering, giving it an aged, authentic appearance. The sides are plain red, with one side displaying a small Shell sticker and the other side holding the hose and nozzle. The back is solid red with no visible branding or features. The overall design is boxy and robust, typical of mid-20th-century gas pumps, and it stands upright on a flat base.
description: A vintage Shell gas pump with a round Shell Oil sign, red and yellow body, and a black fuel hose attached to the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Shell Oil sign, yellow front panel, Shell logo, metallic display plate, and the main fuel dispensing area.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain red surface with a small Shell sticker and no visible hose.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid red back with no branding, hose, or interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the attached black fuel hose and nozzle, with the yellow front panel partially visible.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One visible vintage fuel pump with a rectangular body, round Shell Oil sign on top, yellow front panel, black hose and nozzle attached to the right side, and Shell branding. No digital displays are visible.
attribute_station_signage: Main signage includes a large round Shell Oil sign at the top, a yellow Shell logo on the front panel, and a small Shell sticker on the left side. All signage uses Shell's red and yellow color scheme.
